response.original_title: A Gun is Useless in a Dead Girl's Hands
response.overview: Gun kills man. Woman inherits the earth. Armed with guns, germ warfare books and a sleek, two-fingered hand torch, artists Azian Nurudin, Michelle Handelman and Klara Lux hang around shooting ranges and garanges, appealing to fellow queer women to "Join the lesbian militia!"
response.title: A Gun is Useless in a Dead Girl's Hands
